699 P0200E_WNDR_ALARM_IND P0200E_WNDR_ALARM_IND P0200E Wander/Elopement Alarm CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often a wander/elopement alarm was used to monitor resident movement
and alert staff. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not used
1=Used less than daily
2=Used Daily effective 10/01/2017
700 P0200F_OTHR_ALARM_IND P0200F_OTHR_ALARM_IND P0200F Other Alarm CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often an other type of alarm
